title: Grant of rest days
content:
(1)	
Subject to the provisions of this Part, every employee who 
has been employed by the same employer under a continuous 
contract shall be granted not less than 1 rest day in every 
period of 7 days. (Amended 71 of 1976 s. 3)
	
(2)	
Rest days shall be in addition to any statutory holiday, 
or alternative holiday or substituted holiday, to which an 
employee is entitled under section 39. (Replaced 39 of 1973 
s. 3)
